nasb.text: “So I will incite Egyptians against Egyptians; And they will each fight against his brother and each against his neighbor, City against city and kingdom against kingdom.

esv.text: And I will stir up Egyptians against Egyptians, and they will fight, each against another and each against his neighbor, city against city, kingdom against kingdom;

cnv.text: 我要激動埃及人去攻擊埃及人， 他們就相爭起來，各人攻擊自己的兄弟，各人攻擊自己的鄰舍， 城攻擊城；國攻擊國。

ccb.text: “我必使埃及人彼此为敌——手足相残， 邻居互斗，城邑相争， 邦国互攻。

csbs.text: “我要激起埃及人敌对埃及人， 各人攻击自己的兄弟， 各人攻击自己的邻舍， 城攻击城，国攻击国。
